title: Achacho Punnagai Song Lyrics Shahjahan
stanzas:
Achacho Punnagai Song Lyrics Shahjahan
#ManiSharma #UdiNarayan #Vairamuthu

achacho punnagai
aal thinnum punnagai
kai kuttaiyil
naan pidithu
kayyodu maraithukonden

achacho punnagai
aththipoo punnagai
sindhaamal sidharaamal
mundhaanai yendhi konden

un punnagai
enum saaviyaal
un punnagai
enum saaviyaal
en kadhal thirandhu konden

achacho punnagai
aal thinnum punnagai
kai kuttaiyil
naan pidithu
kayyodu maraithukonden

varthayil kadhalai
sonnaai en
vaaliban nenainthadhadi

unai kalandhapin
nan sendru kulithaal
kadal kudi neer aagumadi

kavidhai idhu kavidhai
innum karpanai
seivomaa

uyirai idam maattri
nam udhadugal serpomaa

ammammaa nuni viral thotte
en idhayam padhariyadhe
aazhangal thoda ennaagum
en uyire sidhariyadhe

nee theendinaal
uyir thoondinaal
nenjil pokraan vedikiradhe

achacho punnagai
aal thinnum punnagai
kai kuttaiyil
naan pidithu
kayyodu maraithukonden

pennukkul ithanai
sugama andha brahmanin
karam vazhga

enakkul thoongiya
sugathai indru
ezhuppiya viral vazhga

adiye suga vagaiye
innum aayiram kodiyadi
kaiyile konjam valaindhaal
en karpanai neelumadi

vetkathai un muthaththaal
nee salavai seidhu vidu
pen dhegam oru pearadu
un peyarai ezhudhividu

iru udhadugal
en ezhudhukoal
vaa anbe valaindhukodu

achacho punnagai
aal thinnum punnagai
kai kuttaiyil
naan pidithu
kayyodu maraithukonden

achacho punnagai
aththipoo punnagai
sindhaamal sidharaamal
mundhaanai yendhi konden

un punnagai
enum saaviyaal
un punnagai
enum saaviyaal
en kadhal thirandhu konden

seo.title: Achacho Punnagai Song Lyrics Shahjahan
seo.description: Full Achacho Punnagai songs lyrics, Shahjahan Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vairamuthu, Music: Mani Sharma, Singer(s): Kavita Krishnamurthy, Udit Narayan.
seo.keywords: Vairamuthu, Shahjahan, Mani Sharma, Kavita Krishnamurthy, Udit Narayan, Achacho Punnagai full lyrics, Shahjahan songs lyrics, Achacho Punnagai lyrics snippets, Achacho Punnagai WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Achacho Punnagai lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Achacho Punnagai?

The song is sung by Kavita Krishnamurthy and Udit Narayan.

Who composed the music for Shahjahan?

The music was composed by Mani Sharma.

What is the theme of the song?

The song celebrates the joy and beauty of love.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Shahjahan?

The lead roles are played by Vijay and Richa Pallod.

When was the movie Shahjahan released?

The movie was released in the year 2001.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Achacho Punnagai from the 2001 Tamil movie Shahjahan, starring Vijay and Richa Pallod, is a melodious duet that exudes romance and happiness. Composed by Mani Sharma with lyrics by Vairamuthu, the song is beautifully rendered by Kavita Krishnamurthy and Udit Narayan. It portrays the emotions of love and admiration, making it a favorite among fans of Tamil cinema. The vibrant music and heartfelt lyrics create an enchanting experience for listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Achacho Punnagai, a delightful melody from the movie Shahjahan, beautifully captures the essence of love and joy. Composed by Mani Sharma with lyrics by Vairamuthu, this song features the enchanting voices of Kavita Krishnamurthy and Udit Narayan. Experience the magic of this romantic duet that continues to resonate with fans of Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Achacho, the smile, the lyrics of Shahjahan, sung by Mani Sharma, Udit Narayan, and Vairamuthu.
Oh, the smile that captivates, I held it in my hands and hid it away.
Oh, the smile like a fig flower, I carried it carefully without spilling or scattering.
With the key of your smile, I unlocked my love.
Oh, the smile that captivates, I held it in my hands and hid it away.
When you expressed love in words, it touched my youthful heart.
After meeting you, even the sea water feels like fresh water when I bathe.
This is poetry, shall we create more imaginations?
Shall we exchange our souls and unite our lips?
Oh dear, when your delicate fingers touch, my heart trembles. What will happen if they touch deeper? My soul shivers.
When you touch, my life quivers, and my heart feels a burning sensation.
Oh, the smile that captivates, I held it in my hands and hid it away.
Is there so much pleasure in a woman? Bless the hands of the creator.
Bless the fingers that awakened the happiness sleeping within me today.
Oh dear, the ways of pleasure are countless. If your hand bends slightly, my imagination extends.
With your kiss, erase my shyness. Write your name on this body of mine.
Let our two lips be the pen, come, my love, and curve towards me.
Oh, the smile that captivates, I held it in my hands and hid it away.
Oh, the smile like a fig flower, I carried it carefully without spilling or scattering.
With the key of your smile, I unlocked my love.
